TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kalaluran, title = Kalaluran, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalaluran} }

S.FORM: Kalaluran Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Kalaluran a niyaro', 193 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 536 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 484 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 52 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 74%, Amis 5%, Tayal 1%, Rukai 2%, Puyuma 2%, roma 5%.
S.PHON: ka…ĺa…ĺo~u~uran itiniaj i taito~u~uŇč ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~u~uran a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, taja…ĺ *%, ro~u~ukai *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Kalaluran Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Kalaluran a niyaro', 193 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 536 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 484 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 52 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 74%, Amis 5%, Tayal 1%, Rukai 2%, Puyuma 2%, roma 5%.
S.PHON: ka…ĺa…ĺo~u~uran itiniaj i taito~u~uŇč ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~u~uran a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, taja…ĺ *%, ro~u~ukai *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%.
